title: Fix copying of non-Buildah Zstd images with --preserve-digests
body:
Fixes https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/2627 .

See individual commit messages for details; note the last comment adding FIXMEs for unfixed bugs.

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6536**
